6. Effects of a Confident Planet.
Should a planet be in Svastha state at birth, the native acquires gold, family etc. He will be a
justice in a kings employ. He will own houses and will amass grains. His family will prosper.
7. Effects of a Rejoicing Planet.
If a planet is in Mudita state at birth, the native will be pleasingly disposed, will have wife, gold,
diamonds etc., will win the entire band of his foes and will enjoy all kinds of comforts in life.
8. Effects of a Peaceful Planet.
If a planet is in Santa, or peaceful state at birth, the native will have peaceful mind, comfort and
wealth. He will be a kings minister, will be learned, helpful to others, religious and fortunate.
9. Effects of a Sakta Planet.
